commit_scope: Align promoted BML read-route proof gates with the native router headers exposed in production.

commands: public curl header probes for five promoted BML endpoints
observations: Production at 136b3a26 and settled production at a412603a return HTTP 200 and X-Form-Router: native-kernel for the five promoted BML read routes.
Those promoted handlers do not currently emit X-Form-Handler or X-Form-Python-Authority, while older kernel-native canaries still do.
The Hostinger canary and public verifier now require the shared native-router proof for these promoted reads and keep handler/authority fields as optional diagnostics.
The full public verifier passed end to end using the corrected branch-local verifier against the deployed ingress state.

phase_gate.reason: Local and live public proof passed; CI, merge, Hostinger deploy, and full public verifier remain for this branch.

evidence_refs: Hostinger Auto Deploy run 27291115342 failed on strict promoted-route handler proof
Hostinger Auto Deploy run 27291680916 failed on the same stale strict promoted-route proof string
public curl probes against https://api.coherencycoin.com after 136b3a26 deploy

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Promoted BML read routes keep deployment green when they are proven native by X-Form-Router without optional per-handler proof headers.
test_flows: Run the promoted-route verifier against the public API and require HTTP 2xx plus X-Form-Router: native-kernel.
Run the full public deploy verifier after merge to prove the corrected gate in the release path.
Confirm the Hostinger deploy canary no longer blocks on absent X-Form-Handler or X-Form-Python-Authority for these promoted read routes.
